_meta.source: Seed file — replace by running fetch_trade_data.py

data_sources.name: World Bank Open Data API
data_sources.description: Total exports and imports of goods and services (current USD)
data_sources.citation: World Bank (2024). World Development Indicators. https://databank.worldbank.org

data_sources.name: UN Comtrade API v1
data_sources.description: Bilateral trade partner flows and commodity breakdown by HS chapter (AG2). Requires free key from comtradedeveloper.un.org.
data_sources.license: UN open data (free tier: 250 req/day with key)
data_sources.citation: United Nations Statistics Division (2024). UN Comtrade Database. https://comtrade.un.org

_meta.methodology: Trade totals from World Bank API (NE.EXP/IMP.GNFS.CD, most recent year). Bilateral partner flows and HS chapter commodity breakdowns from UN Comtrade v1 API (requires free subscription key from comtradedeveloper.un.org). Reference year: 2023, fallback: 2022. FTAs and WTO disputes maintained manually.
_meta.arc_note: Trade flow arcs rendered using ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 centroids computed from Natural Earth geometries, not hardcoded coordinates. Projection-safe.
